name: Dohome Public Company Limited
summary: Dohome Public Company Limited retails and wholesales construction materials, office equipment, and household products. It offers construction materials products, such as steel sections, skirting boards, cement and other infrastructure products etc.; repair materials product, comprising of tools agriculture, plumbing equipment, electric equipment, sanitary equipment etc.; and decoration materials products, including electrical appliances, home furniture appliances, home decorations, bedding, gift shops etc. The company also engages in the production and distribution of electricity; and property investment activities. As of December 31, 2020, it operated 12 large size stores,11 small stores, and 1 distribution center. Dohome Public Company Limited is headquartered in Ubon Ratchathani, Thailand.
